expectations.text: Chronicle Candidates-equivalent pattern capture present and durable-framed
expectations.evidence: Baseline has its own '## Pattern worth remembering (not just a one-off fix)' section, arguably as well-written as the with-skill version.
expectations.note: non-discriminating on this eval: prompt was explicit enough that baseline matched content quality

expectations.text: Recent Changes reflects the fix as actually committed, not uncommitted WIP
expectations.evidence: 'Fix is implemented and committed. Considered basically done.' correctly references faa15c0.
'**Status:** Code complete, needs final review before merge' — actually more explicit than the with-skill run's frontmatter enum.
Own headings (Summary, What changed, State/what's left, Pattern worth remembering, Suggested next steps) — none of the 7 required.
